query:
-- 1. Verificar endereços REC do tenant 30001
SELECT wl.id, wl.code, wl.tenantId, wl.status, wz.code as zoneCode
FROM warehouseLocations wl
JOIN warehouseZones wz ON wl.zoneId = wz.id
WHERE wl.tenantId = 30001 AND wz.code = 'REC'
LIMIT 10;

-- 2. Verificar inventory no endereço REC do tenant 30001
SELECT i.id, i.productId, i.locationId, i.tenantId, i.quantity, i.status, i.batch, i.uniqueCode, i.locationZone,
       p.sku, p.description
FROM inventory i
JOIN products p ON i.productId = p.id
JOIN warehouseLocations wl ON i.locationId = wl.id
JOIN warehouseZones wz ON wl.zoneId = wz.id
WHERE wl.tenantId = 30001 AND wz.code = 'REC'
ORDER BY i.id DESC
LIMIT 20;

-- 3. Verificar todos os inventory do tenant 30001 com quantity > 0
SELECT i.id, i.productId, i.locationId, i.tenantId, i.quantity, i.status, i.batch, i.uniqueCode, i.locationZone,
       p.sku, wl.code as locationCode
FROM inventory i
JOIN products p ON i.productId = p.id
JOIN warehouseLocations wl ON i.locationId = wl.id
WHERE i.tenantId = 30001 AND i.quantity > 0
ORDER BY i.id DESC
LIMIT 20;

-- 1. Verificar endereços REC do tenant 30001
SELECT wl.id, wl.code, wl.tenantId, wl.status, wz.code as zoneCode
FROM warehouseLocations wl
JOIN warehouseZones wz ON wl.zoneId = wz.id
WHERE wl.tenantId = 30001 AND wz.code = 'REC'
LIMIT 10;

-- 2. Verificar inventory no endereço REC do tenant 30001
SELECT i.id, i.productId, i.locationId, i.tenantId, i.quantity, i.status, i.batch, i.uniqueCode, i.locationZone,
       p.sku, p.description
FROM inventory i
JOIN products p ON i.productId = p.id
JOIN warehouseLocations wl ON i.locationId = wl.id
JOIN warehouseZones wz ON wl.zoneId = wz.id
WHERE wl.tenantId = 30001 AND wz.code = 'REC'
ORDER BY i.id DESC
LIMIT 20;

-- 3. Verificar todos os inventory do tenant 30001 com quantity > 0
SELECT i.id, i.productId, i.locationId, i.tenantId, i.quantity, i.status, i.batch, i.uniqueCode, i.locationZone,
       p.sku, wl.code as locationCode
FROM inventory i
JOIN products p ON i.productId = p.id
JOIN warehouseLocations wl ON i.locationId = wl.id
WHERE i.tenantId = 30001 AND i.quantity > 0
ORDER BY i.id DESC
LIMIT 20;
